event: Readymade Assemblage (Why Not Sneeze, Rose Selavy)
description: A small white painted metal birdcage filled with white marble cubes that resemble sugar cubes. A thermometer protrudes from one side, and a yellowish cuttlebone rests atop the cubes. The cage sits on a flat surface against a plain light background. Below the cage, a handwritten signature and the date 1964 are visible. The object has the appearance of a utilitarian birdcage repurposed as a container for unexpected materials.
